title: Add local matching examples to cpp_example and c_example
description: Both examples demonstrate REST API calls and real-time event handling, but local matching features (checkModeAchievements, checkScoreAchievements, incrementProgress, setAchievementTriggeredCallback) are not exercised. AGENTS.md §6.2 requires: New features MUST have example code.
close_reason: Added local matching examples (checkModeAchievements, checkScoreAchievements, incrementProgress, setAchievementTriggeredCallback) to both cpp_example and c_example. Both compile clean.

title: Fix license header typo: scrobit.io -> scorbit.io
description: All new files in the PR have scrobit.io (missing second o) on line 5 of the MIT license header instead of scorbit.io. Affects: achievements.h, achievements_c.h, achievement_manager.h, achievement_manager.cpp, achievements_c.cpp, config.h, config_c.h, event.h, event_types.h, event_types_c.h, event_helpers_c.h, event_classes.h, net_base.h, game_state.h, game_state_impl.h, and more. Violates AGENT_CONVENTIONS §9.2.
close_reason: Fixed scrobit.io -> scorbit.io typo across all 145 files, zero remaining occurrences

title: Add achievement method wrappers to GameState C++ class
description: The public GameState class in include/scorbit_sdk/game_state.h does NOT expose any achievement methods. GameStateImpl has them, the C API works, but the C++ wrapper is missing: fetchAchievements, fetchAchievementProgress, unlockAchievement, lockAchievement, checkModeAchievements, checkScoreAchievements, incrementProgress, setAchievementTriggeredCallback, hasAchievements, getAchievements, getAchievement, getUserProgress, getProgress, checkModeAchievementsWithScore, downloadAchievementFrames, hasDmdFrame, getDmdFrame. The C++ example calls gs.fetchAchievements() and gs.fetchAchievementProgress() which will fail to compile. Violates AGENT_CONVENTIONS §3, §4.1, §7.3.
close_reason: GameState achievement wrappers added and build verified successfully

title: Document restricted file modifications in PR
description: AGENT_CONVENTIONS §7.4 lists files that MUST NOT be modified without explicit request: VERSION (managed by release process), cmake/ (unless build system changes required). The PR modifies VERSION, DOCKER_RELEASE, and adds/modifies 12 cmake/ files. The cmake changes are justified for the new module build. This is informational - no code change needed.
close_reason: Informational only. cmake/ changes justified for achievements module build integration. VERSION/DOCKER_RELEASE modifications noted for PR review awareness.

title: Add MIT license header to identifiers.h
description: source/identifiers.h has only an author header (lines 1-6) but no MIT license block. AGENT_CONVENTIONS §9.2 requires: All source files MUST include the MIT license header.
close_reason: Added MIT license header to identifiers.h matching project standard
